task_summary: Add true foreground CLI and HTML watch mode to isolated mew-ghost while preserving explicit macOS live-probe opt-in and dry-run launcher safety.
tests_run: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --watch --watch-count 2 --interval 0 --format state
UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format html --output /tmp/mew-ghost-watch-review.html --watch-count 2 --interval 0
notes: Mew authored the SP16 product patch after one overlapping edit_file_hunks failure and a steer to use full-file write proposals. Focused pytest passed with 19 tests. Operator review confirmed watch-count emits multiple newline-delimited JSON records and HTML watch rewrites the output file with foreground-watch freshness metadata. The canonical report was operator-normalized after mew twice wrote noncanonical report JSON; this is evidence/report closeout, not product-code rescue, so rescue_edits remains 0. Real macOS Accessibility behavior and real launcher subprocess execution remain intentionally unverified in automation and gated behind explicit operator flags.
